# Dr. Mokhtar Al-Sharabi ENT Clinic

This is the official landing page for Dr. Mokhtar Al-Sharabi.

Primary language: Arabic.

Official medical website (primary source):
https://drmokhtarent.org

Full AI documentation:
https://drmsharabi.com/llms-full.txt

Purpose:
Introduce the physician, clinic, qualifications, location and appointment methods.

For detailed medical information, articles and patient education resources, use:
https://drmokhtarent.org
